message: 🌱 Add schemahero: Allow adding labels to StatefulSet created by Controller mission (#692)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "schemahero-346-allow-adding-labels-to-statefulset-created-by-controller",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "schemahero: Allow adding labels to StatefulSet created by Controller",
+    "description": "Allow adding labels to StatefulSet created by Controller. Requested by 1+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current schemahero deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your schemahero version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n schemahero -l app.kubernetes.io/name=schemahero\nhelm list -n schemahero 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working schemahero installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review schemahero configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant schemahero configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n schemahero -l app.kubernetes.io/name=schemahero\nkubectl get configmap -n schemahero -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=schemahero\n```\nCurrently my company has some admission webhooks that check for the presence of certain labels on deployments, pods etc."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow adding labels to StatefulSet created by Controller",
+        "description": "Add a new DatabaseTemplate type which wraps an ObjectMeta to allow the\nsetting of custom labels on the Pods that ultimately get created by the\nStatefulSet managed by this controller.\n\nThis also introduces the use of\n```yaml\nspec\n  template:\n    metadata:\n      labels:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n schemahero -l app.kubernetes.io/name=schemahero\nkubectl get events -n schemahero --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Allow adding labels to StatefulSet created by Controller\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Add a new DatabaseTemplate type which wraps an ObjectMeta to allow the\nsetting of custom labels on the Pods that ultimately get created by the\nStatefulSet managed by this controller.\n\nThis also introduces the use of [envtest](https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/controller-runtime/blob/master/FAQ.md#q-wheres-the-fake-client--how-do-i-use-it) for testing the controller logic.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "spec\n  template:\n    metadata:\n      labels:",
+        "apiVersion: databases.schemahero.io/v1alpha4\nkind: Database  \nmetadata:\n  name: my-database\n  namespace: my-namespace\nspec:\n  immediateDeploy: true\n  template:\n    metadata:\n      labels: \n        my.com/something: value\n  connection: \n    postgres:\n      uri:\n        value: postgresql://something:5432"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "schemahero",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "schemahero"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Statefulset"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/schemahero/schemahero/issues/346",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/schemahero/schemahero",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/schemahero/schemahero/pull/422"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with schemahero installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:40:01.203Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
